- [Composables](/docs/api/composables) — Reactive primitives that drop into any component setup. _(11 symbols)_
- [Stores](/docs/api/stores) — Pinia stores managing cross-cutting state. _(2 symbols)_
- [Services](/docs/api/services) — Stateless service objects for HTTP and platform integrations. _(7 symbols)_
